name: sideklick
description: AI study sidekick desktop app for class sessions, context-aware help, and quiz generation.

scripts.backend:start: node --import tsx --eval "import('./apps/backend/src/server.ts').then((mod) => { const api = mod.startServer ? mod : mod.default; return api.startServer(); })"
scripts.backend:dev: node --import tsx --eval "import('./apps/backend/src/server.ts').then((mod) => { const api = mod.startServer ? mod : mod.default; return api.startServer(); })"
scripts.check: node --check apps/desktop/src/main.js && node --check apps/desktop/src/preload.js && node --check apps/desktop/src/renderer.js && node --check apps/desktop/src/home.js
